title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that integrates frontier models, over 30 scientific databases (UniProt, PubChem, ChEMBL), and research tools to accelerate hypothesis-to-experiment workflows. The platform demonstrates coordinating models, literature, and data in multi-step tasks, exemplified by rapid genetic variant investigation.
